description: You are an HR Business Partner at TechNova Inc. tasked with updating the official organizational chart to reflect a major corporate restructuring. Update the existing chart at '~/Diagrams/org_chart.drawio' by implementing all changes detailed in the restructuring memo at '~/Desktop/restructuring_memo.txt', including promotions, new hires, department moves, and title changes. Ensure the diagram strictly follows all nine points in the memo and applies the specified department color-coding while maintaining a clean layout with no overlapping boxes. Save the modifications to the original .drawio file and export the final chart as a PNG to '~/Diagrams/exports/org_chart.png' and as a PDF to '~/Diagrams/exports/org_chart.pdf'.
